case_title: GEORGE YONG YAO SUN VS. LEUNG TO CHOW et al

DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANT LEUNG TO CHOW WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT CHOW, LEUNG TO CHOW, CHI CHIU

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN, GEORGE YONG YAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOW, LEUNG TO CHOW, CHI CHIU $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,165.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2013 - APPELLANT'S ORAL REQUEST TO CONTINUED THIS HEARING IS DENIED. SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON DEC-19-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 606, JUDGE LAM. NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE FOR HEARING TODAY. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE; CLERK: D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2013 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF OCT-08-2013 REMAINS THE SAME EXCEPT FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE NEWTON J. LAM, CLERK C. BANAYAD (D606)
